name: Poste Italiane Italian Postal and Logistics REST API
what_it_does: Poste Italiane postal and logistics REST API for Italian e-commerce merchants, retailers, and businesses to create shipments, generate labels, track parcels, locate post offices and parcel lockers (Fermopoint), and access financial postal services across Italy and to international destinations — enabling automated Italian domestic and international parcel shipping, registered mail, SDA express delivery, and logistics integration through Poste Italiane's national Italian postal and financial network. Enables AI agents to manage shipment creation for Italian parcel and registered mail booking automation, handle SDA express label for fast courier delivery automation, access tracking for Italian parcel and registered letter status monitoring automation, retrieve Fermopoint location for Italian parcel locker and pickup point finder automation, manage returns for Italian e-commerce reverse logistics automation, handle customs for international Italian parcel declaration automation, access posta raccomandata for certified Italian mail automation, retrieve estimated delivery for Italian postal transit time automation, manage financial postal for postal payment and BancoPosta automation, and integrate Poste Italiane with e-commerce and WMS systems for Italian postal logistics automation.
use_cases: Creating Italian domestic shipments via Poste Italiane for e-commerce merchants selling in Italy automation agents
Tracking parcels and registered mail across Italy for customer notification automation agents
Locating Fermopoint pickup locations for Italian last-mile flexible delivery automation agents
Generating SDA express labels for time-sensitive Italian courier delivery automation agents
not_for: International express shipping at DHL/FedEx level (Poste Italiane is national postal, not premium global express)
B2B pallet/freight shipping (Poste Italiane handles parcels and letters, not freight)
Non-Italian markets (Poste Italiane is Italy-focused; international requires coordination with foreign posts)
best_when: An Italian e-commerce merchant, marketplace, or business wanting AI agents to automate parcel creation, SDA express delivery, tracking, and Fermopoint pickup across Italy through Poste Italiane's extensive national postal and logistics network.
avoid_when: BUSINESS CONTRACT REQUIRED: Poste Italiane API requires business agreement; automated open developer access assumption creates no_access without Poste Italiane contract; automated must establish Poste Italiane business account. SDA IS SEPARATE FROM STANDARD POST: SDA (Poste Italiane's express courier) has different API endpoints and capabilities from standard postal; automated unified Poste assumption creates service_mismatch; automated must integrate SDA Express separately for courier operations. FERMOPOINT NETWORK HAS COVERAGE GAPS: Fermopoint parcel lockers are concentrated in urban areas; automated uniform coverage assumption creates no_locker_available in rural Italy; automated must check Fermopoint availability by postcode. ITALIAN FISCAL CODE REQUIRED FOR SOME SERVICES: Italian registered mail and financial postal services may require Italian fiscal code (codice fiscale); automated no-fiscal-code assumption creates missing_fiscal_code for regulated postal services.

auth.notes: Poste Italiane uses OAuth2 + API key for postal REST API. REST API with JSON. Rome, Italy HQ. Listed company (Borsa Italiana: PST). Partially state-owned (Italian government ~30%). Founded 1862. Products: Parcel (standard, registered), SDA Express (courier), Fermopoint (lockers), BancoPosta (financial). 12,800+ post offices. SDKs: None. National postal + financial services hybrid. Competes with BRT, GLS, and DHL for Italian parcel delivery.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test environment for registered business customers; production requires Poste Italiane contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-shipment pricing by service (SDA Express, Posta Prioritaria, Raccomandata); volume contract pricing
pricing.notes: Rome IT. Borsa Italiana listed. Per-shipment pricing. Italy domestic + international. 12,800+ post offices.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; shipment and tracking APIs throttled per account

known_agent_gotchas: DOCUMENTATION IS IN ITALIAN: Poste Italiane API documentation is primarily in Italian; automated English-only assumption creates language barrier for non-Italian developers; automated must work with Italian-language technical documentation

SDA AND STANDARD POSTAL ARE SEPARATE SYSTEMS: SDA Express courier and Poste Italiane standard mail use different API systems; automated unified-postal assumption creates service_routing_error; automated must use correct API endpoint per service type

ITALIAN CAP POSTAL CODES REQUIRED: Italian postal codes (CAP) must be valid 5-digit codes; automated free-form address assumption creates address_validation_failure; automated must validate Italian CAP and province codes

RACCOMANDATA HAS LEGAL STATUS: Italian raccomandata (registered mail) provides legal proof of delivery; automated standard tracking assumption misses raccomandata legal requirements; automated must use raccomandata service for legally-binding delivery proof

FERMOPOINT LOCKER AVAILABILITY IS DYNAMIC: Fermopoint locker availability changes; automated pre-cached locker assumption creates locker_full or locker_unavailable errors; automated must query real-time Fermopoint availability before assigning locker delivery
agent_readiness.security_notes: Italian postal. GDPR. OAuth2. IT/EU. Parcel and Italian recipient address data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Italian postal. GDPR. OAuth2. Italy/EU. Parcel and address data.
